nativeProps: React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement> with value, defaultValue, onChange, and children reserved

compositionPolicy.value: The 2D area, named HSB channel sliders, optional alpha slider, swatches, ColorField editor, preview, contrast output, and form value share one immutable RGBA8 sRGB value.
compositionPolicy.keyboard: Saturation, brightness, hue, and alpha each have a named native range input. The 2D interaction is an enhancement and never the sole route to a value.
compositionPolicy.field: The embedded ColorField is the primary label-associated editor and canonical form owner. showPreview and showContrast independently remove their output when false.
compositionPolicy.forcedColors: Authored gradients and swatch fills are suppressed; system borders, focus, selection check, channel text, canonical text, and native range semantics remain.
